notes: Version Release Notes added to initialization.
When your version of CymBuild is out of date, a message will display warning you of an update. The system will refresh automatically.
Better system Caching - improved performance, This is the start of something new so will be ongoing and improvements all the time.
Ability to search on a records Reference (Not Unique) added.
Filters and Sorting abilities greatly improved, now allowing multiple variations
Ability to merge Accounts - (Restricted to users with permissions - Training will be given)
New Finance Memos added to Accounts, Finance and Jobs
When selecting a Time within a Date Selection Box, to aid simplicity the Minutes now only show 15 in intervals for easier selection

notes.text: When navigating or using the Dev/Test Site, you will now be presented with a scrolling navigation bar informing you of this:

notes: Over 30 bug fixes and improvements including better binding and message interaction.
